notes: Quality gates: typecheck ✓ lint ✓ tests (7620 passed, 745 test files) ✓. AC-1 collapsible UAT tree child with persist state—tested in FeatureItem.test.tsx. AC-2 tree row rendering without card wrapper—tested in UatStackStatus.test.tsx with density='tree' snapshot. AC-3 stopped/unhealthy/starting/stale matrix with honest gray status for cleanly-stopped stacks—comprehensive unit tests with fake-timer age calculations (no red for exit 0). AC-4 inline actions always-visible per state—tested in FeatureItem.test.tsx with getByTestId('uat-stack-tree-header'). AC-5 right-click context menu with Reap destructive—tested firing and resolveUatActions outputs. All acceptance criteria covered by unit tests; no UAT required (dashboard would need container setup for realistic testing, but all features are observable via unit test snapshots and action resolver outputs).
